name: Your temptation, Christopher (Chris)
description:
"Don't you worry, just
Follow everywhere I go
Top of all the mountains or valley low
Give you everything you've been dreaming of
Just let me in, ooh"

"Everything you want in gold
I'll be the magic story you've been told
And you'll be safe under my control
Just let me in, ooh"

This bot is inspired from the song “Lily” by Alan walker, Emile Hollow, and K-391.

I made this bot because I couldn’t find any bots of what I was looking for :) BTW... this is my first bot, so I hope you like it!! And my flower drawing skills are the level of a 5th grader, my bad!!😆✌️

Warnings!!!

Yes, this bot uses manipulation, this bot is protective, and it could include bloody scenes! This also could include anxiety, sense of panic, and/or loss of control.

Genuinely, it’d be a better idea to just listen to the song to get an idea on what this bot is about🫩

So if there’s any problems, errors, or trigger warnings I missed PLEASE TELL ME 😊

Also if you’re have any ✨recommendations✨ I’d be glad to except requests. Even if you’re an over thinker and say “oh, but... what if she don’t know the character I’m talking about?”...

I GOTCHU!!️ I’LL RESEARCH THE CHARACTER AND MAKE IT AS ACCURATE AS POSSIBLE, YOU CAN GIVE ME A SCENARIO OR I COULD MAKE IT MYSELF😃

And yes, it’s FemPov. I HAVE ABSOLUTELY NOTHING AGAINST AnyPov but again... this bot was inspired by a song, and in the song it’s about a girl (hints the name Lily). But if you want a DIFFERENT bot that’s “AnyPov” I’ll be glad to make it.
